title: KIDS ZONE AFTER SCHOOL - 211info
text: NEIGHBORS FOR KIDS KIDS ZONE AFTER SCHOOL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers preschool, after school, non-school day, and summer camps. Opportunities for educational enrichment, homework help, STEM (science, technology, engineering, and mathematics), arts and crafts, music lessons, recreation, sports, Teen Zone activities, and more. Healthy meals are provided daily. 634 SE Highway 101 Depoe Bay, OR 97341 Eligibility: Preschool: Ages 3-5 All other programs: Ages 3-18 Hours: School year: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm After school program: Monday-Friday 4pm-6pm Summer: Monday-Friday 8am-5:30pm Email (541) 765-8990 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 765-8990 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, walk in, or visit website for information. Web registration is available online. FEES: Varies by service. Scholarships available for low income families -Meals: None -After school programs: None -Non-school days: Varies DOCUMENTS: Completed application, vaccination records, proof of income if applying for scholarship LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lincoln County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located at south end of Depoe Bay, on east side of Highway 101. Lincoln County bus stop located in front of site. Services: After School Meal Programs Camps Preschools Youth Enrichment Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NEIGHBORS FOR KIDS
